copypastas.text: honse MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

In Counter-Strike, where bullets fly, A sneaky cheater’s always nigh. They toggle hacks with perfect glee, and headshot you from A to B.  Their aimbot snaps like it’s possessed, with wallhacks, they see through the rest. But while they flex their soulless game, we all just sigh—it’s such a shame.  They bunny hop, they speed, they snipe, and claim it's "skill" (yeah, sure—alright). But deep inside, we know the truth, their mom’s Wi-Fi has lost its youth.

Floofys Baking soda and baking powder are not the same. Sodium bicarbonate and bicarbonate of soda are other names for baking soda. Baking powder is made of baking soda plus cream of tartar and cornstarch. Baking powder can be substituted for baking soda by tripling the amount of baking powder.
